problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
